p.strong: Trap handler sets the pending bit for the right signal

pre.code:
unsigned int pending_signals[NUM_IDS]; // one word per process
Bit: 31 ......... 11 ... 9 ........ 2 1 0 SEGV KILL INT ↓ ↓ ↓ Example: 0000 0000 0000 1000 0000 0000 = 0x800 (SIGSEGV) Example: 0000 0000 0000 0000 0000 0100 = 0x004 (SIGINT) Example: 0000 0000 0000 0010 0000 0000 = 0x200 (SIGKILL)

ul.li: Checked by handle_pending_signals() before trap return
Cleared bit-by-bit as each signal is processed
Shell blocked in readline → yield loop
Shell's handler decides what to do
Used by shell handler: kill(child, SIGKILL)
